title: Satellite Analytics Workbench
description: A high-density data visualization tool featuring complex filtering logic and a master-detail selection area.

title: Through the Quiet Lens
description: A web-based visual novel exploring student stress and anxiety. Powered by a custom-built, data-driven narrative engine designed for extensible storytelling and branching paths.
full_description: Through the Quiet Lens is a web-based visual novel game that explores themes of mental health with respect to college student stress and anxiety. The storyline allows for a choose-your-own-adventure experience through a data-driven narrative engine that handles branching story states and original hand-drawn character assets.
features: Branching dialogue and state-based story paths
Original character design and digital assets

title: Animal Shelter Operations
description: A comprehensive policy and workflow redesign for animal relinquishment and adoption event procedures.
